recommendations.title: A Babysitter's Guide to Monster Hunting
recommendations.overview: Recruited by a secret society of babysitters, a high schooler battles the Boogeyman and his monsters when they nab the boy she's watching on Halloween.

recommendations.title: Tank Girl

recommendations.title: Freddy's Dead: The Final Nightmare

recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, TV Movie, Mystery, Adventure, Fantasy

recommendations.title: Doctor Who: Last Christmas
recommendations.overview: The Doctor and Clara face their Last Christmas. Trapped on an Arctic base, under attack from terrifying creatures, who are you going to call? Santa Claus!

recommendations.title: No Date, No Signature
recommendations.overview: Kaveh Nariman is a Doctor in the medical examiner's office. One day at his work he meets a corpse which is very familiar to him.

recommendations.title: The Butterfly Effect

recommendations.title: Hunter Killer
recommendations.overview: Captain Glass of the USS Arkansas discovers that a coup d'état is taking place in Russia, so he and his crew join an elite group working on the ground to prevent a war.

recommendations.title: Doctor Who: Time Crash
recommendations.overview: After Martha Jones parts company with the Doctor, his TARDIS collides with another, and he comes face to face with one of his previous incarnations.

recommendations.title: Alien: Romulus
recommendations.overview: While scavenging the deep ends of a derelict space station, a group of young space colonizers come face to face with the most terrifying life form in the universe.
